title: Create Aeronautics : Honey Pan
description: Adding a new way to craft honey !
body:
A new way to craft honey !

With this mod, you no longer need to farm for honey glue !

Want to build big ships but don't have enough glue ?
Instead of farming honey, use this mod !

Features:
- Craft a pan
- Fill it with liquid honey
- Use the pan to craft a honey block

Let your creativity run wild in Create Simulated !
